## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content strategy and onboard Tarun to the Airtable content management system.](https://fathom.video/share/gAXz3cypmrEEpgtuZvDyyDsJ41sG_e3m?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New content manager started, focusing solely on Unstructured's content](https://fathom.video/share/gAXz3cypmrEEpgtuZvDyyDsJ41sG_e3m?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Content.os on Airtable ready for topic approval; Tarun to review](https://fathom.video/share/gAXz3cypmrEEpgtuZvDyyDsJ41sG_e3m?tab=summary&timestamp=14.0)
  - [Goal: 50 posts/month (40-70 range), \~50k words total](https://fathom.video/share/gAXz3cypmrEEpgtuZvDyyDsJ41sG_e3m?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [Content strategy aims to increase visibility in Gen AI space, similar to Zapier's approach](https://fathom.video/share/gAXz3cypmrEEpgtuZvDyyDsJ41sG_e3m?tab=summary&timestamp=427.0)

## Topics

### Content Management Updates

  - [New dedicated content manager for Unstructured started](https://fathom.video/share/gAXz3cypmrEEpgtuZvDyyDsJ41sG_e3m?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Content review process: Jürgen to review and return by tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/gAXz3cypmrEEpgtuZvDyyDsJ41sG_e3m?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)
  - [Content.os on Airtable set up for topic approval](https://fathom.video/share/gAXz3cypmrEEpgtuZvDyyDsJ41sG_e3m?tab=summary&timestamp=14.0)
  - [Tarun assigned to review and approve topics](https://fathom.video/share/gAXz3cypmrEEpgtuZvDyyDsJ41sG_e3m?tab=summary&timestamp=30.0)

### Airtable Walkthrough

  - [Three main sections: Assignment Generation, Ready to Start, Considering](https://fathom.video/share/gAXz3cypmrEEpgtuZvDyyDsJ41sG_e3m?tab=summary&timestamp=151.0)
  - [Assignment Generation: Topics approved, briefs in progress](https://fathom.video/share/gAXz3cypmrEEpgtuZvDyyDsJ41sG_e3m?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)
  - [Ready to Start: Articles ready for creation (5 recommended topics)](https://fathom.video/share/gAXz3cypmrEEpgtuZvDyyDsJ41sG_e3m?tab=summary&timestamp=174.0)
  - [Considering: New topics from keyword gap analysis with competitors](https://fathom.video/share/gAXz3cypmrEEpgtuZvDyyDsJ41sG_e3m?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [Process: Approve/reject topics in "Considering," move to "Assignment Generation"](https://fathom.video/share/gAXz3cypmrEEpgtuZvDyyDsJ41sG_e3m?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)

### Content Strategy and Goals

  - [Target: 50 posts/month (40-70 range depending on depth)](https://fathom.video/share/gAXz3cypmrEEpgtuZvDyyDsJ41sG_e3m?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
  - [Word count: \~50,000 words/month](https://fathom.video/share/gAXz3cypmrEEpgtuZvDyyDsJ41sG_e3m?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [Article length: 700-1,500 words (current example: 1,100 words)](https://fathom.video/share/gAXz3cypmrEEpgtuZvDyyDsJ41sG_e3m?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)
  - [Strategy inspired by Zapier's content approach](https://fathom.video/share/gAXz3cypmrEEpgtuZvDyyDsJ41sG_e3m?tab=summary&timestamp=427.0)
  - [Focus on Gen AI-related topics, even if not directly about Unstructured](https://fathom.video/share/gAXz3cypmrEEpgtuZvDyyDsJ41sG_e3m?tab=summary&timestamp=479.0)
  - [Aim to be part of broader conversations in the AI space](https://fathom.video/share/gAXz3cypmrEEpgtuZvDyyDsJ41sG_e3m?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)

### Content Creation Process

  - [Keyword gap analysis performed using legacy keywords and competitor research](https://fathom.video/share/gAXz3cypmrEEpgtuZvDyyDsJ41sG_e3m?tab=summary&timestamp=258.0)
  - [Jürgen to provide Loom video explaining outline creation process](https://fathom.video/share/gAXz3cypmrEEpgtuZvDyyDsJ41sG_e3m?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)
  - [Content to include subtle mentions of Unstructured, not heavy-handed promotion](https://fathom.video/share/gAXz3cypmrEEpgtuZvDyyDsJ41sG_e3m?tab=summary&timestamp=599.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Tarun to review and approve topics in Airtable (focus on "Considering" section)](https://fathom.video/share/gAXz3cypmrEEpgtuZvDyyDsJ41sG_e3m?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)
  - [Jürgen to rename Airtable phases for clarity](https://fathom.video/share/gAXz3cypmrEEpgtuZvDyyDsJ41sG_e3m?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)
  - [Jürgen to create and share Loom video on outline creation process](https://fathom.video/share/gAXz3cypmrEEpgtuZvDyyDsJ41sG_e3m?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)
  - [Team to begin ramping up content production to meet 50 posts/month goal](https://fathom.video/share/gAXz3cypmrEEpgtuZvDyyDsJ41sG_e3m?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)
  - [Next sync scheduled for the following week](https://fathom.video/share/gAXz3cypmrEEpgtuZvDyyDsJ41sG_e3m?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)
